variants: Willow Farnham, an esteemed professional at Sundew Design Agency, proudly calls Moonberry Isles her home. Born in Greenwill Dells, she honed her skills by studying at the Umbercliff School of Law, which she utilizes to enhance her design expertise. Her creative contributions have not gone unnoticed; she has earned the Harborlight Ribbon for her outstanding achievements in the field. Willow's unique background not only informs her work but also inspires her artistic journey in her current vibrant community.
